UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile information and planner preference settings.

grade.description: Grade or academic level of the student

dailyStudyGoal.description: Daily study focus target in minutes

planType.description: The user subscription pricing plan tier

darkMode.description: User preference for dark appearance mode

color.description: Tailwind color class or Hex code

userId.description: The owner user ID matching request.auth.uid

ClassSchedule.title: ClassSchedule
ClassSchedule.description: Class or lab scheduled timings linked to a subject.

id.description: Unique identifier of the class schedule

subjectId.description: The subject ID linked to this class slot

className.description: Optional custom name for this specific lecture / lab

dayOfWeek.description: Day of the week for the class

room.description: Optional room number or online zoom link

userId.description: The owner user ID matching request.auth.uid

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Task representing school assignments, homework, and test review topics.

priority.description: The priority classification of the study task

completedAt.description: Optional date when completion occurred in format YYYY-MM-DD

userId.description: The owner user ID matching request.auth.uid

id.description: Unique identifier of the focus log

durationMinutes.description: Number of minutes of study sessions accumulated

dateTime.description: Date of study session in YYYY-MM-DD format

subjectId.description: Optional subject focused on during the session

userId.description: The owner user ID matching request.auth.uid

users/{userId}.description: User profiles collection indexed by UID

classes/{classId}.description: Schedules for classes linked to a subject
